ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If enabled, snippets will be saved in

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Add the following file in the Alfred workflow configuration. (Just double click and copy the path)
ast.target: 在 Alfred 工作流配置中添加以下文件。（只需双击并复制路径）

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error saving snippets as Alfred JSON:
ast.target: 将片段保存为 Alfred JSON 时出错：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of file paths or folder paths (e.g. Snippets.md, Programming/)
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的文件路径或文件夹路径列表（例如：Snippets.md, Programming/）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of tags to load snippets from (e.g. #snippet, #templates). Snippets from all files with these tags will be loaded.
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的标签列表，用于加载来自这些标签的片段（例如：#snippet, #templates）。所有包含这些标签的文件中的片段都将被加载。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, snippets from subdirectories or tags will include their folder path. When disabled, only the file name is used.
ast.target: 启用后，来自子目录或标签的片段将包含其文件夹路径。禁用后，仅使用文件名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove code block markdown (```) from snippet content when loading snippets.
ast.target: 加载片段时，从片段内容中移除代码块标记（```）。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show full folder path as prefix
ast.target: 显示完整文件夹路径作为前缀

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No snippet locations or tags provided.
ast.target: 未提供片段位置或标签。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please follow the same heading level throughout the file
ast.target: 请在整个文件中保持相同的标题级别

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to save snippets as Alfred JSON
ast.target: 将片段保存为 Alfred JSON 失败
